feat.name: Fearsome Fangs
feat.text: Your claws and jaws are brutally powerful and efficient, even by ursine standards. The base damage of your jaws unarmed attack from Ursine Avenger Form increases to 1d12. The base damage of your claws unarmed attack from Ursine Avenger Form increases to 1d8.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
